input: Help me write a 15-second single-shot prompt: a female mech warrior raises an energy shield in a thunderstorm at a rainy dock. Gritty hard sci-fi, battle-damaged, live-action feel.
I want a 15s robot transformation. Green color palette, energy core in the belt buckle, post-apocalyptic jungle background.
Write a weapon-charge-then-combat sequence in two segments: a lone warrior charges a heavy energy weapon, then fights. Cinematic, weighty impacts.
A multi-shot narrative short: a small salvage robot wanders into an abandoned seaside bar at dusk and is startled by a noise behind the counter.
